_comment: Prompt/concept dataset for the AV-localization probe. Every concept word APPEARS in its prompt (possibly inflected, e.g. 'cloud'->'cloudy'), because the simplified Exp1 readout borrows the concept's text token. The first two entries mirror the ConceptAttention repo examples (with sky/cloud/tree added into the prompt so they resolve here). To probe concepts NOT in the prompt, you need the concept-token upgrade.

prompts.name: dragon
prompts.prompt: A dragon standing on a rock under a cloudy sky

prompts.name: cat_park
prompts.prompt: A cat in a park on the grass near a tree under the sky

prompts.name: dog_ball
prompts.prompt: A dog playing with a ball by a tree on the grass

prompts.name: cat_table
prompts.prompt: A cat sitting on a wooden table

prompts.name: car_street
prompts.prompt: A red car parked on a street beside a building

prompts.name: boat_lake
prompts.prompt: A boat on a lake with mountains in the distance

prompts.name: bird_branch
prompts.prompt: A bird perched on a branch in the forest

prompts.name: coffee_book
prompts.prompt: A cup of coffee and a book on a table

prompts.name: horse_field
prompts.prompt: A horse running across a grassy field under a blue sky

prompts.name: beach_person
